MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-24-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND RESET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL. MATTHEW KEIM, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO RESET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL. THE COURT SETS A TRIAL DATE OF 7/11/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE VIA E-FILING BY 4:00PM TODAY WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Jasmine Shih.

Dept. 505; Judge Linda M Villarreal; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:31 a.m. and concluding at 10:45 a.m.

Nicholas Morello, Esq apperaed on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Jamine Shih.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

PAMELLA RITTER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Credit Card Application
Exhibit 2: Terms and Conditions
Exhibit 3: Monthly Statments

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against Defendant Jamine Shih, as follows:

1. Damages: $9244.30
2. Costs: $435.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $9,679.30

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits. (D505)
